docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR REVIEW & SIGNATURE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ-CORTES, LUIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $559.00 FILED BY RODRIQUEZ-CORTES, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED APR-21-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, ADAM
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED. GIVEN TO CLERK OF DEPT 506 FOR THE 6-2-15 HEARING.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
